meta.description: Benchmark analysis for the layered-search-performance change. Compares tokenize and replace workload throughput against the pre-change baseline captured in results_builtin.json.

replace_remove_spaces.description: SPAN-based space removal throughput vs pre-change baseline
replace_remove_spaces.note: 7.3× improvement: layered search eliminates VM dispatch overhead for SPAN fast path

replace_replace_vowels.description: ONEOF-based vowel replacement throughput vs pre-change baseline
replace_replace_vowels.note: 6.8× improvement: single-char candidate set search path accelerates per-character scan

replace_replace_words.description: Literal word replacement throughput vs pre-change baseline
replace_replace_words.note: 46.8× improvement: literal-prefix fast path via memmem/memchr dramatically reduces scan cost

replace_remove_punctuation.description: BREAK-based punctuation removal throughput vs pre-change baseline
replace_remove_punctuation.note: 46.5× improvement: BREAK acceleration with bitmap/chunked scan eliminates character-by-character VM dispatch

tokenize_comma.description: CSV comma tokenization throughput vs pre-change baseline
tokenize_comma.note: 12.5× improvement: JIT compilation of search-mode comma pattern (499,480 JIT entries, 0 choice pushes)

tokenize_whitespace.description: Whitespace tokenization throughput vs pre-change baseline
tokenize_whitespace.note: 12.9× improvement: JIT-compiled SPAN search eliminates repeated VM initialization overhead

tokenize_mixed.description: Mixed-pattern tokenization throughput vs pre-change baseline
tokenize_mixed.note: 3.3× improvement: lower gain expected for backtracking-heavy patterns (4.9M choice pushes); no JIT eligibility due to ARB complexity

replace_benchmark.description: Pattern-based text replacement vs PCRE, compared against pre-change baseline

search_diagnostics.note: Search candidate bailouts are expected: vowel pattern misses most positions
Search candidate bailouts expected: BREAK finds boundary quickly and skips non-punctuation positions

tokenize_benchmark.description: CSV/whitespace tokenization vs PCRE, compared against pre-change baseline; includes BREAKX vs ARB comparison

search_diagnostics.note: JIT compiled for search mode; partial bailouts are correct — each comma position triggers a JIT exit after matching
ARB in mixed pattern disqualifies JIT and automaton paths; improvement comes from search dispatcher overhead reduction

breakx_vs_arb.description: BREAKX vs ARB+NOTANY for key extraction (unchanged from pre-change baseline)
breakx_vs_arb.note: BREAKX throughput increased from 2,347.55 to 3,022.09 ops/sec (1.29× via layered dispatcher improvements)

key_improvements: replace_words and remove_punctuation: ~46× improvement via literal and BREAK fast paths (memmem/memchr/bitmap scan)
tokenize_comma and tokenize_whitespace: ~12-13× improvement via JIT search-mode compilation (0 choice pushes for delimiter patterns)
remove_spaces and replace_vowels: ~7× improvement via SPAN and single-char candidate set acceleration
tokenize_mixed: 3.3× improvement (lower bound expected — ARB disqualifies fast paths, improvement is from dispatcher overhead only)
BREAKX throughput improved 1.29× vs baseline due to layered dispatcher efficiency gains
All search-aware diagnostics (jit_search_entries, candidate_rejects, search_cold_skips) correctly reported
Zero memory safety regressions: 1235 C tests pass, 177 PHP tests pass

search_mode_diagnostics_summary.description: New search-mode metrics added by this change for observability
search_mode_diagnostics_summary.jit_search_entries_total: Counts how many times the JIT search path was entered (distinct from anchored-match JIT entries)
search_mode_diagnostics_summary.jit_search_candidate_rejects: Expected misses where candidate pre-filter correctly avoided full VM dispatch
search_mode_diagnostics_summary.jit_skipped_search_cold_total: Search patterns skipped during cold warmup (correct — avoids poisoning hot-path accounting)
search_mode_diagnostics_summary.jit_bailout_search_candidate_total: Bailouts from search fast-path where candidate filter correctly rejected the position

analysis.environment: DDEV container, PHP 8.4.18, Linux, libsnobol4 v0.2.0
